name: saidat-aloud
description: صيدات العود — منصة سعودية لبيع وشراء العود والبخور بالمزاد والسوق

scripts.smoke: echo '=== Smoke Test ===' && curl -sf http://localhost:8000/ > /dev/null && echo '✅ index.html' || echo '❌ index.html' && curl -sf http://localhost:8000/market > /dev/null && echo '✅ market.html' || echo '❌ market.html' && curl -sf http://localhost:8000/dashboard > /dev/null && echo '✅ dashboard.html' || echo '❌ dashboard.html' && curl -sf http://localhost:8000/login > /dev/null && echo '✅ login.html' || echo '❌ login.html' && curl -sf http://localhost:8000/js/config.js > /dev/null && echo '✅ config.js' || echo '❌ config.js' && curl -sf http://localhost:8000/js/dashboard-app.js > /dev/null && echo '✅ dashboard-app.js' || echo '❌ dashboard-app.js' && echo '=== Done ==='

author: صيدات العود
